static_proof.fix_summary: Added getEnqueueAtomicFallbackReason() sentinel function to run-audit-service.ts. Replaced bare catch {} at line 160 with catch (err) { if (!getEnqueueAtomicFallbackReason(err)) throw err; }. Only errors matching 'enqueueDistributionAtomic is not supported in InMemory mode' are allowed to fall through to sequential writes. All other errors (DB constraint violations, network timeouts, PGRST202/RPC-not-found) rethrow immediately.
